title: Blameless Post-Mortem Culture
description: Implement a blameless post-mortem process to identify structural and systemic failures following incidents. Design post-mortem workflows that foster continuous learning and drive long-term system resilience.
objectives: Implement a blameless post-mortem process to identify structural and systemic failures following incidents.
Design post-mortem workflows that foster continuous learning and drive long-term system resilience.
